title: Understanding the Problem
text: To find the speed of the object after $$5$$ seconds, we need to use the formula for speed when acceleration is constant. The formula is: final speed $$=$$ initial speed + (acceleration * time).

title: Initial Speed
text: Since the object begins from rest, what is the initial speed?

title: Calculate the Final Speed
text: Use the formula: final speed $$=$$ initial speed + (acceleration * time). Given that the initial speed is $$0$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$, acceleration is $$4.23$$ $$\frac{m}{s^2}$$, and time is $$5$$ seconds, calculate the final speed.
